name: Issue Contract Parser
when_to_use: Разбирает Linear issue/comment thread в нормализованный machine-readable contract: goal, scope, non-goals, acceptance criteria, verification path, repo, affected repos, risk, dependencies, open questions и, при необходимости, integration-specific fields.
Seed rationale: Даёт всем агентам одинаковую исходную модель задачи и резко снижает дрейф смысла между triage/spec/build/review.
inputs: Входы: issue body, labels, status, project, comments, links. Выход: JSON contract + confidence + missing_fields. Должен уметь учитывать @ask, timestamps, decisions summary, repo registry и optional integration fields: provider_name, integration_kind, auth_scheme, required_credentials, secret_slots, required_scopes, oauth_redirect_uris, webhook_callback_urls, test_strategy, go_live_checklist, rollback_plan.
steps: TBD: convert the seed build spec into a stable step-by-step skill contract.
stop_conditions: TBD: define success and stop boundaries before runtime consumption.
escalation_rules: Escalate when the required source-of-truth inputs are missing, contradictory, or blocked by a human-owned zone.
anti_patterns: Do not duplicate always-on repo guidance inside selective skills.
Do not silently widen role scope beyond the owning skill pack.
denied_actions: Do not treat this skeleton metadata as runtime-ready execution logic before the later runtime-consumption blocks.
description: Разбирает Linear issue/comment thread в нормализованный machine-readable contract: goal, scope, non-goals, acceptance criteria, verification path, repo, affected repos, risk, dependencies, open questions и, при необходимости, integration-specific fields.
why: Даёт всем агентам одинаковую исходную модель задачи и резко снижает дрейф смысла между triage/spec/build/review.
build_spec: Входы: issue body, labels, status, project, comments, links. Выход: JSON contract + confidence + missing_fields. Должен уметь учитывать @ask, timestamps, decisions summary, repo registry и optional integration fields: provider_name, integration_kind, auth_scheme, required_credentials, secret_slots, required_scopes, oauth_redirect_uris, webhook_callback_urls, test_strategy, go_live_checklist, rollback_plan.
source_refs: source/Маршруты в зависимости от разных задач.md#11
